items.title: WC final tickets listed on FIFA resale at over $2M
items.summary: FIFA's resale site has four tickets on sale for the World Cup final for just under $2.3 million each.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Gaikwad dedicates CSK's 103-run win against MI to Mukesh Choudhary
items.summary: The left-arm seamer played his part in CSK's win against MI following the death of his mother on Tuesday
